description: UI code must not import database clients or ORM packages directly.

forbiddenImports.message: UI code must go through a service/repository boundary instead of importing DB packages.
UI code must not reach directly into repository/database modules.

pass.content:
import { useCart } from '@/service/cart';
export function Checkout() { return null; }

fail.content:
import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
export function Checkout() { return null; }
